messages.content:
Describe how this vulnerability could affect system integrity.

wolfSSL wolfMQTT 1.9 has a heap-based buffer overflow (4 bytes) in MqttDecode_Publish (called from MqttClient_DecodePacket and MqttClient_HandlePacket).
This vulnerability can compromise system integrity by allowing unauthorized modifications in memory, which could be exploited to execute arbitrary code with the privileges of the application.
